generated_assessment.reasoning: This 85-year-old woman is highly extraverted and trusting (Agreeableness trust at 70th pct), which typically correlates with trust in mainstream institutions, but her conventional Openness (38th pct) and high Anger/Hostility (64th pct) temper that trust. Her advanced age suggests long-term reliance on traditional news, yet her high excitement-seeking and moderate neuroticism may make her critical of perceived biases. The score of 412 reflects clear but not unconditional support for mainstream journalism, acknowledging its role while retaining reservations.
